nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Black-backed tody-flycatcher
nodes.summary: Black-backed tody-flycatcher（Black-backed tody-flycatcher，学名 Poecilotriccus pulchellus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于常綠森林、原始森林、次生林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits dense shrubby vegetation on the edges of humid evergreen forest both primary and secondary and also nearby overgrown fields and gardens

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits dense shrubby vegetation on the edges of humid evergreen forest both primary and secondary and also nearby overgrown fields and gardens

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits dense shrubby vegetation on the edges of humid evergreen forest both primary and secondary and also nearby overgrown fields and gardens

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified though habitat loss is a potential threat. It is considered uncommon. "Given that this species occupies habitats (dense understory tangles) that are frequent at forest edge, however, it also is possible that this species may be increasing in abundance or expanding its range in the lowlands, in response to clearing for agriculture along riverbanks."
